actionUnits.condition: UnityEngine.EventSystems.EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id: 297462335, guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building4 is configured with eventID 4 (PointerClick). Its m_Calls target MonoBehaviour id: 297462333 (guid: 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68), which is the Residential script attached to Building4. Triggering a PointerClick on Building4 should invoke Residential.showlabel(), updating the Player/Child(1) TextMeshPro label with the first 20 characters of 'Residential:Neko Apartment'.

EventTrigger on Building4 (MonoBehaviour id: 297462335, guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) is configured with eventID 4 (PointerClick) to call Residential.showlabel() on MonoBehaviour id: 297462333 (guid: 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68). Triggering should update the Player child(1) TextMeshPro text to the first 20 chars of 'Residential:Neko Apartment'.
